description: Adds a datasource to a data agent's staging configuration. Triggers async schema discovery (LRO).
notes: Datasource creation is LRO (1-5 min for schema discovery). Use --lro-timeout 300 for reliability. After adding, schema elements may be empty for 1-5 minutes. Check with 'fabio data-agent list-elements'. Max 5 datasources per agent. Supported fabricItemType values: Report, SemanticModel, Lakehouse, KQLDatabase, Warehouse, MirroredDatabase, SQLDatabase, Ontology, GraphModel.

query_examples.description: Datasource ID (used for fewshots, elements, removal).
Type of the connected Fabric item.
